center.name: Christian Erich Hermann von Meyer
center.summary: Christian Erich Hermann von Meyer是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Green-backed robin、拟雀啄果鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The green-backed robin (Pachycephalopsis hattamensis) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: First described by Christian Erich Hermann von Meyer in 1875, it is monotypic within the genus Oreocharis. It is found in the New Guinea Highlands and more scarcely in northern parts of the island, in subtropical or tropical moist montane forests
